code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if is_digit
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      sign = -1
    else
      if in_num
        if idx < 2
          nums[idx] = cur * sign
          idx = idx + 1
        end
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if idx < 2
      nums[idx] = cur * sign
      idx = idx + 1
    end
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let r = a * a + b * b
  print("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
